tool.name: list_payload_categories
tool.description:
List all available payload categories in the Ziro library with counts.
Cheap informational call — use when you don't remember what categories exist. Returns name, payload count per category.

returns.description: categories list (category name, count, file path), total_categories, total_payloads.

tool.name: load_payload_list
tool.description:
Load battle-tested payloads from a category in the Ziro payload library.
LLMs regularly invent subtly-broken payloads (wrong quoting, missing escape, ineffective encoding). This tool gives you curated, tested payload lists so you use inputs that are known to work against real targets.
Categories include: sql_injection, xss, ssrf, path_traversal, ssti, command_injection, xxe, open_redirect, nosql_injection. Each file has 30-200 payloads organized by attack technique (error-based, blind, OOB, WAF bypass, etc.) with inline comments explaining the grouping.
Typical workflow: 1. load_payload_list(category="sql_injection", count=40) — get 40 SQLi payloads 2. fuzz_request_parameter(request_id="...", parameter="id", payloads=payloads, parameter_location="query") 3. Inspect high-interest rows, use repeat_request / view_request for details
Use the `contains` filter to narrow: contains="sleep" for time-based SQLi, contains="169.254" for cloud metadata SSRF, contains="php://" for PHP wrappers in path traversal, etc.

parameter.name: category
parameter.description: Payload category: sql_injection, xss, ssrf, path_traversal, ssti, command_injection, xxe, open_redirect, nosql_injection. Call list_payload_categories if unsure.

parameter.name: count
parameter.description: Max number of payloads to return. Default 50.

parameter.name: contains
parameter.description: Case-insensitive substring filter — only return payloads containing this string. Useful for narrowing to specific techniques (e.g., "sleep" for time-based SQLi, "169.254" for cloud metadata).

returns.description: category, total_in_category (after filtering), returned count, offset, payloads list, usage note.
